ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: IF( AND(ISNEW(),Active__c,Contract__r.Active_Contract_Asg_Rig__c = 1,CONTAINS(Unit_Type__c,"Rig")), true, IF( AND(PRIORVALUE(Active__c ) = false,Active__c = true,Contract__r.Active_Contract_Asg_Rig__c = 1,CONTAINS(Unit_Type__c,"Rig")), true, false ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: For a Contract, at a time only one contract assignment of type Rig can be active.
